sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, angle_radians DOUBLE, start_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, pi(), DATE '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (2, pi()/2, DATE '2023-01-02');
SELECT id, degrees(angle_radians) AS angle_degrees, start_date + INTERVAL degrees(angle_radians) DAY AS new_date FROM test_data WHERE degrees(angle_radians) > 0;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (event_date DATE, event_count INT);

SELECT t.id, degrees(t.angle_radians) AS angle_degrees, a.event_date + INTERVAL degrees(t.angle_radians) DAY AS event_trigger_date FROM test_data t JOIN additional_data a ON a.event_date = t.start_date + INTERVAL 1 DAY WHERE a.event_count IS NOT NULL ORDER BY event_trigger_date;
CREATE TABLE aggregated_data (group_id INT, group_value DOUBLE);
SELECT group_id, AVG(degrees(group_value)) AS avg_degrees FROM aggregated_data GROUP BY group_id HAVING avg_degrees IS NOT NULL;

SELECT t.id, degrees(t.angle_radians) AS angle_degrees, a.event_date FROM test_data t LEFT JOIN additional_data a ON a.event_date = DATE '2023-01-01' + INTERVAL degrees(t.angle_radians) DAY WHERE a.event_count IS NULL;
